BOLT.notes: #466 CLOSED (Date.now() RSC sites got eslint-disable in 05b37be, lint 11→6). TOP PRIORITY: #467 [P1] P0-3 setState-in-effect eslint-disable sweep — 6 sites, all per-audit-recommendation idiomatic. Target files + lines + justification each should cite: (1) src/app/pick-logo/pick-logo-client.tsx:68 — admin-only tool, state sync acceptable. (2) src/components/shop/cart-button.tsx:27 — hydration flag, mounts once. (3) src/components/shop/checkout/express-checkout-buttons.tsx:32 — platform detection, mounts once. (4) src/components/shop/cookie-consent.tsx:45 — localStorage read, mounts once. (5) src/components/shop/mobile-nav.tsx:51 — route-change drawer close, external navigation sync. (6) src/components/shop/product-gallery.tsx:236 — video element pause sync on slide change, external DOM sync. Pattern per site: `// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/set-state-in-effect -- <one-line reason from list above>`. Do NOT refactor these into useSyncExternalStore / useMemo / render-time reads — the audit explicitly endorsed eslint-disable for these specific patterns. Do NOT add a file-level or project-level eslint-config disable of the rule. Do NOT touch warnings in this task (P1-3 unused-vars is a separate upcoming task). Acceptance: lint 6 errors → 0 errors, warnings count unchanged (~20), tsc clean, next build green, atomic single commit, Czech diacritics untouched. After #467: no queued Bolt — go idle and await next Lead cycle (next candidate will be P1-3 unused-import sweep or P1-4 uploadthing→upload-client rename).
